visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a middle-aged man biting into a large spring roll, his facial expression suggesting satisfaction. The camera then cuts to a close-up shot of hands using a spoon to spread a layer of peanut powder and sugar on a white spring roll wrapper. (2) A woman wearing a black HAHABABY t-shirt stands in a brightly lit modern kitchen. She holds a bowl of noodles and points towards various prepared ingredients spread out on the counter, including shredded cabbage, bamboo shoots, and carrots. (3) The woman begins the cooking process; she pours beaten eggs into a hot black wok, followed by a montage of her stir-frying the vegetables. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the vibrant colors of the food. (4) She moves to a cutting board where she wears plastic gloves to manually tear pieces of roasted chicken leg into thin strips. (5) A series of close-up shots show the completed ingredients: sautéed cabbage, sliced carrots, bamboo strips, seasoned pork belly, and shredded chicken. (6) The woman is then seen helping a young boy with glasses wrap a spring roll at the kitchen counter. The boy takes a large bite, and they both smile at the camera. (7) The final phase features the woman adding noodles to her roll, with variety-style text overlays appearing on screen to highlight a debate about whether spring rolls should contain noodles. (8) The video ends with a stylistic circular vignette effect on the woman as she looks at the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 今天要來做春捲. [Logo]: @HAHABABY. (2) [Slogan]: 清明 - 掃墓祭祖 追思感恩. (3) [Subtitle]: 春捲還是潤餅都可以. (4) [Variety]: 高麗菜. [Variety]: 竹筍. [Variety]: 紅蘿蔔. [Variety]: 雞肉. [Variety]: 蛋. (5) [Subtitle]: 照個人喜好 脆的軟的都可以. (6) [Subtitle]: 把肉塊剁成肉絲. (7) [Variety]: 備料就完成啦 YUMMY. (8) [Variety]: 全家大小一起DIY. (9) [Subtitle]: 一定要有麵 沒有麵就覺得怪怪的. (10) [Variety]: 潤餅南北之戰 有麵? 沒麵?. (11) [Variety]: 有麵派 無麵派. (12) [Variety]: 底下留言 你家的潤餅有麵嗎?.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 man eating at the start, 1 young boy, and 1 debate participant in the later segment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with her hair tied up, wearing a casual black short-sleeved t-shirt with 'HAHABABY' printed on it.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern kitchen with white cabinets, a black stovetop, stainless steel appliances, and organized kitchenware.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a bright, upbeat acoustic guitar and piano track that provides a cheerful background throughout. A man makes a satisfied eating sound as he bites into the food. (2) A woman's voice, energetic and high-pitched, enters the mix. She speaks clearly and quickly, introducing the cooking activity. (3) Subtle sizzling sounds are heard as the woman fries eggs, layered under her friendly narration. High-frequency 'ding' sound effects punctuate the appearance of on-screen ingredient names. (4) The woman explains the chicken preparation, her voice exhibiting a playful and excited tone. (5) Sound of playful laughter and the high-pitched voice of a child appear as they work together, creating a warm, familial atmosphere. (6) The audio concludes with a more dynamic section where multiple female voices discuss regional food differences, ending with a synthesized 'whoosh' sound during the final visual transition.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Process -> Demonstration -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a step-by-step tutorial for making traditional spring rolls (runbing) during the Qingming Festival, while promoting a family-oriented lifestyle and engaging the audience through a debate about regional culinary preferences.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator wears apparel from her own brand, HAHABABY, throughout the entire tutorial.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy editing style and popular food debates to maximize viewer engagement on social media platforms.
